item.title: A Masked Killer Tried To Convince Everyone He Was Insane
item.description: Dawson McGehee became the focus of a bizarre criminal case after a masked attack led investigators to question whether his claims of mental illness were genuine. As the evidence unfolded, prosecutors argued that his actions were part of a calculated attempt to avoid responsibility for the crime.

media:content.media:title: A Masked Killer Tried To Convince Everyone He Was Insane
media:content.media:description: Dawson McGehee became the focus of a bizarre criminal case after a masked attack led investigators to question whether his claims of mental illness were genuine. As the evidence unfolded, prosecutors argued that his actions were part of a calculated attempt to avoid responsibility for the crime.

item.title: His Disturbing Obsession Hid A Deadly Secret
item.description: Charlie Brandt appeared to live a quiet life for decades, but after a horrific crime scene exposed his hidden interests, investigators began connecting him to multiple killings. The case revealed a disturbing obsession that may have been hiding in plain sight for years

media:content.media:title: His Disturbing Obsession Hid A Deadly Secret
media:content.media:description: Charlie Brandt appeared to live a quiet life for decades, but after a horrific crime scene exposed his hidden interests, investigators began connecting him to multiple killings. The case revealed a disturbing obsession that may have been hiding in plain sight for years

item.title: He Said His Family Was Being Targeted All Along
item.description: Chris Coleman claimed his family was receiving threatening messages and feared for their safety. After his wife and two young sons were found dead, investigators uncovered evidence that revealed a far darker truth behind the murders.

media:content.media:title: He Said His Family Was Being Targeted All Along
media:content.media:description: Chris Coleman claimed his family was receiving threatening messages and feared for their safety. After his wife and two young sons were found dead, investigators uncovered evidence that revealed a far darker truth behind the murders.

item.title: A Wealthy Heir's Secret Plot Ended In Multiple Murders
item.description: Dellen Millard inherited a multimillion dollar aviation empire, but investigators later accused him of orchestrating a series of murders to protect his interests and conceal his actions. The shocking case became one of Canada's most notorious criminal investigations.

media:content.media:title: A Wealthy Heir's Secret Plot Ended In Multiple Murders
media:content.media:description: Dellen Millard inherited a multimillion dollar aviation empire, but investigators later accused him of orchestrating a series of murders to protect his interests and conceal his actions. The shocking case became one of Canada's most notorious criminal investigations.

item.title: She Went From Working For Royalty To A Prison Cell
item.description: Jane Andrews once worked as a dresser for Sarah Ferguson and appeared to live an enviable life. Everything changed after a turbulent relationship ended in a high profile murder case that captivated the United Kingdom.

media:content.media:title: She Went From Working For Royalty To A Prison Cell
media:content.media:description: Jane Andrews once worked as a dresser for Sarah Ferguson and appeared to live an enviable life. Everything changed after a turbulent relationship ended in a high profile murder case that captivated the United Kingdom.

item.title: A Newlywed's Chilling Confession Shocked Everyone
item.description: Miranda Barbour made national headlines after claiming she had committed numerous killings across the United States while being investigated for the death of a man she met online. Her shocking statements sparked intense debate about what was true, what was exaggerated, and what investigators could actually prove.

media:content.media:title: A Newlywed's Chilling Confession Shocked Everyone
media:content.media:description: Miranda Barbour made national headlines after claiming she had committed numerous killings across the United States while being investigated for the death of a man she met online. Her shocking statements sparked intense debate about what was true, what was exaggerated, and what investigators could actually prove.

item.title: A Mother's Online Posts Hid A Dark Secret
item.description: Lacey Spears shared constant updates about her son's health struggles on social media, gaining sympathy and support from thousands. Investigators later uncovered evidence that led to murder charges and one of the most disturbing caregiver abuse cases in recent years.

media:content.media:title: A Mother's Online Posts Hid A Dark Secret
media:content.media:description: Lacey Spears shared constant updates about her son's health struggles on social media, gaining sympathy and support from thousands. Investigators later uncovered evidence that led to murder charges and one of the most disturbing caregiver abuse cases in recent years.

item.title: A Love Triangle Led To A Deadly Plan
item.description: Brenda Delgado became the focus of an international manhunt after authorities accused her of orchestrating a plot against a romantic rival in Texas. The case exposed jealousy, obsession, and a scheme that ultimately unraveled across multiple countries.

media:content.media:title: A Love Triangle Led To A Deadly Plan
media:content.media:description: Brenda Delgado became the focus of an international manhunt after authorities accused her of orchestrating a plot against a romantic rival in Texas. The case exposed jealousy, obsession, and a scheme that ultimately unraveled across multiple countries.
